element_introduction_order.mastery_context: enemies enter in waves rather than all at once; players learn dodging and positioning
secondary objective alongside survival; competitive scoring in co-op
collectibles with no mechanical impact; reward exploration within arenas
enhance combat effectiveness; learned through experimentation
multiple exit choice creates branching level paths; no backtracking allowed
one guaranteed boss per level; players must choose correct exit to reach it
collection unlocks bonus Pleasure Dome level; optional/advanced content
late-game reward level with simplified enemy patterns and abundant collectibles

typical_relief_triggers: clearing all enemies from current arena
typical_tension_triggers: dwindling health with no power-ups available
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: wave-based combat with escalating difficulty; continuous pressure with periodic relief; boss encounters provide climactic tension spikes

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: keys scattered throughout levels signal bonus level accessibility; prize items indicate thoroughness of exploration
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: sufficient key collection unlocks hidden Pleasure Dome bonus level (post-game unlock pattern)

difficulty_curve.early_game: introduction to wave mechanics and arena positioning; basic enemy types with manageable density
difficulty_curve.mid_game: increased enemy variety; denser wave patterns; multiple arena types per level
difficulty_curve.late_game: boss encounters with complex attack patterns; reliance on collected power-ups; competitive scoring pressure in co-op
notable_spikes: first boss encounter at end of level 1
final boss (sadistic host character) represents arcade-era coin-op difficulty

notable_level_patterns.description: each level composed of multiple self-contained arenas; player completes all enemies in arena, then chooses exit to next arena; no scrolling within arena
notable_level_patterns.example_level: level 1 demonstrated with blue player character and four-edge enemy entry passages

notable_level_patterns.description: map display after first arena shows overall level layout and boss location; multiple exit choices create different path sequences through level
notable_level_patterns.example_level: all levels follow this structure post-arena-1

notable_level_patterns.description: one or more exits lead to boss arena; player must select correct path from available choices
notable_level_patterns.example_level: level structure includes guaranteed boss encounter at designated endpoint

notable_level_patterns.description: keys scattered throughout normal levels; collecting sufficient quantity unlocks special Pleasure Dome bonus level with different aesthetic and reward structure
notable_level_patterns.example_level: bonus level accessible only after main campaign progression

sources_used: tcrf: level select and hidden content documentation
